com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors

Class ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Composite

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.github.dakusui.actionunit.visitors.ActionRunner.IgnoredInPathCalculation.Composite

    • Method Detail

      • size

        public int size()
        Description copied from interface: Composite
        Returns number of actions that this object has if they are given as a Collection. Otherwise, for instance actions are given as Iterable, -1 will be returned.
        Specified by:
        size in interface Composite
